analysis.consistency: High. The spell description clearly defines its effect, duration, and scaling mechanism.
analysis.quality: Good. The mechanics are straightforward, providing a temporary, stackable bonus to a weapon, which is a common and well-understood effect.

mechanics.primary_effect: Grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls on a nonmagical weapon.
mechanics.balance_consideration: As a 2nd-level spell with concentration, the +1 bonus is fair, especially given the scaling options available at higher slots. It competes with other concentration spells of the same level.
